title: Science.
content:
Miranda-like, above the world she waves
    The wand of Prospero; and, beautiful,
    Ariel the airy, Caliban the dull,
    Lightning and steam, are her unwilling slaves.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Science.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
